subject: Spring-boot 3 upgrade in resources
commit_message:

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/aai-resources-master-verify-java/688/ : FAILURE

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/aai-resources-master-verify-java/688/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/aai-resources-master-verify-java/688
